new_classes.label_en: semi-sparkling wine of fresh grapes in containers > 2 L (CN 2204 29 10)
new_classes.label_de: Halbschaumwein aus frischen Weintrauben in Behältnissen > 2 L (KN 2204 29 10)
new_classes.definition_en: Wine of fresh grapes, other than sparkling wine of subheading 2204 10, presented either in bottles closed with mushroom stoppers held in place by ties or fastenings, or otherwise put up with an excess pressure due to carbon dioxide in solution of not less than 1 bar but less than 3 bar measured at 20 °C, in containers of a nominal volume exceeding 2 litres.

coverage_explanation: The main distinguishing criteria are captured: (1) wine of fresh grapes (subclass of SemiSparklingWine → WineOfFreshGrapes), (2) exclusion of subheading 2204 10 sparkling wine (complement restriction on SparklingWine), (3) container volume > 2 L (someValuesFrom LargeContainer via BFO has_part), (4) excess pressure due to dissolved CO₂ ≥ 1 bar and < 3 bar at 20 °C (ExcessPressureQuality quality and decimalRange restrictions on excessPressureBar). The mushroom-stopper presentation criterion is partially captured — the existing MushroomStopperPackaging class in the TBox covers that packaging type, but a full equivalence axiom covering BOTH the mushroom-stopper branch AND the pressure-range branch (as alternative sufficient conditions) cannot be expressed as a simple intersection; the disjunction of these two presentation forms is not fully formalised. Coverage is therefore set to 0.85 rather than 1.0.
